svg:
<svg width="1920" height="1080" viewBox="0 0 1920 1080" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect id="svg_1" x="0" y="0" width="1920" height="1080" fill="#647d8b" />
  <g id="svg_2">
    <rect x="580" y="30" width="760" height="920" rx="40" fill="#add8e6" fill-opacity="0.3" stroke="#5d707d" stroke-width="20" />
    <rect x="590" y="40" width="740" height="900" rx="35" fill="none" stroke="#ffcc00" stroke-width="8" />
  </g>
  <g id="svg_3">
    <defs>
      <rect id="shape_1" x="610" y="100" width="700" height="820" rx="20" />
    </defs>
    <clipPath id="clip_1">
      <use href="#shape_1"/>
    </clipPath>
    <g clip-path="url(#shape_1)" id="svg_clip_1">
      <image id="svg_img_1" href="data:image/jpeg;base64," x="610" y="100" width="700" height="820" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" />
    </g>
  </g>
  <text id="svg_4" x="960" y="180" font-family="RecipekoreaM" font-size="120" fill="#e63946" stroke="#ffcc00" stroke-width="4" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">썸머세-일</text>
  <text id="svg_5" x="660" y="520" font-family="KyoboHandwriting2020" font-size="60" fill="#457b9d" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" style="writing-mode: vertical-rl; text-orientation: upright;" text-anchor="middle">쇼핑은 필수니까</text>
  <text id="svg_6" x="1260" y="520" font-family="KyoboHandwriting2020" font-size="60" fill="#457b9d" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" style="writing-mode: vertical-rl; text-orientation: upright;" text-anchor="middle">휴가 떠나기 전에</text>
  <text id="svg_7" x="960" y="1010" font-family="GmarketSansTTFBold" font-size="65" fill="#ffcc00" text-anchor="middle">7월1일~7월10일</text>
  <g id="svg_8">
    <line x1="630" y1="1005" x2="730" y2="1005" stroke="#ffcc00" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="1190" y1="1005" x2="1290" y2="1005" stroke="#ffcc00" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />
  </g>
</svg>
